plugins.description: Portable LLM OS with hierarchical planning (beta.1 — pre-flight Tier 1: 7 bash linters block destructive ops + credential leaks). 14 agents, 5-phase TDD + T0-T4 planning, 67 rules, 52 skills, 18 commands, 38 hooks, 6 MCP servers.
